query:
ALTER TABLE campaigns 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetRevenue DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS kpis TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT DEFAULT NULL;
